basic_details.job_title: AVFCCL Chief Financial Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Assam Valley Fertilizers and Chemical Company Limited (AVFCCL)
basic_details.short_information: Here is a quick summary table of the AVFCCL CFO Recruitment 2026 notification for candidates to get a snapshot of the key details before proceeding with the application.

application_fee.details: The official AVFCCL recruitment notification (Advt. No. E/03/2026) does not specify any application fee details for the CFO post. Candidates are advised to check the official application portal at the time of applying for any updates regarding application fee, if applicable.

age_limit.details: The upper age limit for the Chief Financial Officer post is 53 years as on the cut-off date of 31 March 2026.

qualification.details: Candidates must carefully check the eligibility criteria before applying for the AVFCCL Chief Financial Officer post. The main eligibility parameters are educational qualification, age limit, and post-qualification work experience. | Candidates applying for the CFO post must hold any one of the following qualifications: | Chartered Accountant (CA), or Cost and Management Accountant (CMA), or Two years full-time regular MBA (Finance) with a minimum of 60% marks | Note: Articleship and partnership experience will not be considered towards eligibility or work experience. | The candidate must possess a minimum of 25 years of post-qualification work experience. The role requires: | Extensive experience in Corporate Financial Management and Corporate Accounts At least 2 years at a senior management level such as General Manager (Finance), Finance Head, or Department Head (Finance) Preferably experience in a large manufacturing, process, fertilizer (ammonia and urea, natural gas based), petrochemical, or refinery organization Experience in managing finances for large-scale projects, governance, compliance, and interaction with government/regulatory agencies is desirable Exposure to fertilizer industry operations, subsidy mechanisms, and government interfaces will be an added advantage

salary_details.details: AVFCCL offers an attractive, industry-competitive compensation package for the CFO position. | In addition to Basic Pay, the selected candidate will be eligible for: | Industrial Dearness Allowance (IDA) as notified by DPE House Rent Allowance (HRA) as notified by the Government of India Cafeteria Perks up to 35% of Basic Pay Superannuation Benefits up to 30% of Basic + DA Applicable location-based allowance Medical insurance cover for the employee and dependent family members, over and above CTC | Candidates currently working in a PSU or Government organization (Central/State) should be working one level below the equivalent pay scale, and their pay will be protected as per DPE guidelines, subject to submission of an NOC at the time of interview.

selection_process: AVFCCL reserves the right to conduct the selection process through any combination of the following
depending on the number of applications received:
Screening of applications based on eligibility criteria Written Test (if deemed necessary) Group Discussion (GD)
if applicable Personal Interview Skill Test or Trade Test
Only shortlisted candidates found apparently eligible based on the notified specifications will be called for the next stage of selection.
how_to_apply: Eligible candidates can apply for the AVFCCL Chief Financial Officer post by following these steps:
Visit the official AVFCCL careers portal at https://JOBS.AVFCCL.NET.IN/
Register using a valid and active e-mail ID and mobile number
Fill in the online application form with accurate personal, educational, and experience details
Upload the required photograph, signature, and supporting documents in the specified format and size
Review the filled application carefully, as no modifications are allowed after submission
Submit the application before the last date, i.e., 27 July 2026 (05:00 PM)
Save/download a copy of the submitted application for future reference
Applications sent through any mode other than the prescribed online mode will stand rejected.
important_instructions: Only Indian Nationals are eligible to apply. All qualifications must be from an Indian university/institute recognized by AICTE/UGC or the appropriate statutory authority. Candidates with foreign qualifications must produce an equivalence certificate. Qualifying degree/diploma should be full-time and regular; distance learning qualifications are not accepted. Work experience should be relevant executive experience acquired after obtaining the required educational qualification. Teaching/lectureship, part-time jobs, apprenticeship, internship, and articleship will not be counted. Candidates should submit only one application for one position; the application cannot be altered once submitted. Canvassing in any form at any stage of the selection process will lead to disqualification. Any dispute regarding this recruitment will be settled within the jurisdiction of Assam/Guwahati only. AVFCCL reserves the right to raise eligibility standards, restrict the number of applications, cancel, or modify the recruitment process at any stage without assigning any reason. Appointment is subject to the candidate being found medically fit as per AVFCCL rules and standards of medical fitness. Selected candidates for regular positions will be on probation for a period of 1 year.

content_sections.heading: AVFCCL Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: The AVFCCL Recruitment 2026 notification has been released by Assam Valley Fertilizers and Chemical Company Limited (AVFCCL) for the post of Chief Financial Officer (CFO) at its Guwahati Corporate Office. AVFCCL, a joint venture of the Government of Assam Download AVFCCL Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: AVFCCL Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: Here is a quick summary table of the AVFCCL CFO Recruitment 2026 notification for candidates to get a snapshot of the key details before proceeding with the application.

rows.details: Assam Valley Fertilizers and Chemical Company Limited (AVFCCL)

content_sections.heading: About AVFCCL
content_sections.text: AVFCCL (Assam Valley Fertilizers and Chemical Company Limited) is a joint venture company incorporated by the Government of Assam, Oil India Limited (OIL), National Fertilizers Limited (NFL), Hindustan Urvarak & Rasayan Limited (HURL), and Brahmaputra Valley Fertilizer Corporation Limited (BVFCL). The company's prime objective is to establish and operate a state-of-the-art, environment-friendly, and energy-efficient Natural Gas based Fertilizer Complex (Ammonia-Urea) with a capacity of 2200 MTPD Ammonia and 3850 MTPD Urea (1.27 MMTPA neem coated urea) at Namrup, Assam.

content_sections.heading: AVFCCL CFO Recruitment 2026: Important Dates
content_sections.text: Candidates are advised not to wait until the last date to avoid last-minute server load or technical issues on the application portal.

rows.event: Start date for submitting online application

content_sections.heading: AVFCCL Vacancy Details 2026
content_sections.text: AVFCCL has notified 1 vacancy for the post of Chief Financial Officer under the Finance discipline at its Guwahati Corporate Office.

content_sections.heading: AVFCCL CFO Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates must carefully check the eligibility criteria before applying for the AVFCCL Chief Financial Officer post. The main eligibility parameters are educational qualification, age limit, and post-qualification work experience. Candidates applying for the CFO post must hold any one of the following qualifications: Chartered Accountant (CA), or Cost and Management Accountant (CMA), or Two years full-time regular MBA (Finance) with a minimum of 60% marks Note: Articleship and partnership experience will not be considered towards eligibility or work experience. The candidate must possess a minimum of 25 years of post-qualification work experience. The role requires: Extensive experience in Corporate Financial Management and Corporate Accounts At least 2 years at a senior management level such as General Manager (Finance), Finance Head, or Department Head (Finance) Preferably experience in a large manufacturing, process, fertilizer (ammonia and urea, natural gas based), petrochemical, or refinery organization Experience in managing finances for large-scale projects, governance, compliance, and interaction with government/regulatory agencies is desirable Exposure to fertilizer industry operations, subsidy mechanisms, and government interfaces will be an added advantage

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: The upper age limit for the Chief Financial Officer post is 53 years as on the cut-off date of 31 March 2026.

content_sections.heading: AVFCCL CFO Salary and Pay Scale 2026
content_sections.text: AVFCCL offers an attractive, industry-competitive compensation package for the CFO position. In addition to Basic Pay, the selected candidate will be eligible for: Industrial Dearness Allowance (IDA) as notified by DPE House Rent Allowance (HRA) as notified by the Government of India Cafeteria Perks up to 35% of Basic Pay Superannuation Benefits up to 30% of Basic + DA Applicable location-based allowance Medical insurance cover for the employee and dependent family members, over and above CTC Candidates currently working in a PSU or Government organization (Central/State) should be working one level below the equivalent pay scale, and their pay will be protected as per DPE guidelines, subject to submission of an NOC at the time of interview.

content_sections.heading: AVFCCL Recruitment 2026 Application Fee
content_sections.text: The official AVFCCL recruitment notification (Advt. No. E/03/2026) does not specify any application fee details for the CFO post. Candidates are advised to check the official application portal at the time of applying for any updates regarding application fee, if applicable.

content_sections.heading: AVFCCL CFO Selection Process 2026
content_sections.text: As per the official notification, AVFCCL reserves the right to conduct the selection process through any combination of the following, depending on the number of applications received: Screening of applications based on eligibility criteria Written Test (if deemed necessary) Group Discussion (GD), if applicable Personal Interview Skill Test or Trade Test, if applicable Only shortlisted candidates found apparently eligible based on the notified specifications will be called for the next stage of selection.

content_sections.heading: Documents Required for AVFCCL CFO Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Before filling the online application, candidates should keep the following documents ready in scanned format: Passport-size photograph and signature in JPG/JPEG format (20 KB to 50 KB) Passing certificates and mark sheets of essential educational qualifications (CA/CMA/MBA Finance) Post-qualification experience certificates clearly mentioning nature of job, date of joining, and date of relieving (offer/appointment letter, experience certificate, last 3 months' pay slip, joining/relieving order, maximum size 500 KB) No Objection Certificate (NOC) from the current employer/HOD, mandatory for candidates working in PSUs/Government organizations Notarized affidavit (in case NOC cannot be produced due to administrative reasons) confirming no vigilance/disciplinary case is pending Incomplete applications or those submitted with blurred/faded document proof will be summarily rejected.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for AVFCCL Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Eligible candidates can apply for the AVFCCL Chief Financial Officer post by following these steps: Visit the official AVFCCL careers portal at https://JOBS.AVFCCL.NET.IN/ Register using a valid and active e-mail ID and mobile number Fill in the online application form with accurate personal, educational, and experience details Upload the required photograph, signature, and supporting documents in the specified format and size Review the filled application carefully, as no modifications are allowed after submission Submit the application before the last date, i.e., 27 July 2026 (05:00 PM) Save/download a copy of the submitted application for future reference Applications sent through any mode other than the prescribed online mode will stand rejected.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for AVFCCL Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Only Indian Nationals are eligible to apply. All qualifications must be from an Indian university/institute recognized by AICTE/UGC or the appropriate statutory authority. Candidates with foreign qualifications must produce an equivalence certificate. Qualifying degree/diploma should be full-time and regular; distance learning qualifications are not accepted. Work experience should be relevant executive experience acquired after obtaining the required educational qualification. Teaching/lectureship, part-time jobs, apprenticeship, internship, and articleship will not be counted. Candidates should submit only one application for one position; the application cannot be altered once submitted. Canvassing in any form at any stage of the selection process will lead to disqualification. Any dispute regarding this recruitment will be settled within the jurisdiction of Assam/Guwahati only. AVFCCL reserves the right to raise eligibility standards, restrict the number of applications, cancel, or modify the recruitment process at any stage without assigning any reason. Appointment is subject to the candidate being found medically fit as per AVFCCL rules and standards of medical fitness. Selected candidates for regular positions will be on probation for a period of 1 year.

faq.question: Q1. What is the AVFCCL Recruitment 2026 about?
faq.answer: AVFCCL Recruitment 2026 is a notification (Advt. No. E/03/2026) inviting online applications for the post of Chief Financial Officer (CFO) at the AVFCCL Guwahati Corporate Office.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in AVFCCL CFO Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There is 1 vacancy notified for the Chief Financial Officer post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the last date to apply for AVFCCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application is 27 July 2026 (05:00 PM).

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the AVFCCL CFO post?
faq.answer: Candidates must be a CA, or CMA, or hold a two years full-time regular MBA (Finance) with a minimum of 60% marks.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for AVFCCL CFO Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The upper age limit is 53 years as on the cut-off date of 31 March 2026.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for the AVFCCL Chief Financial Officer post?
faq.answer: The post carries an E-8 grade pay scale of Rs. 120000-280000, with an approximate CTC of INR 38 LPA, along with additional perks and benefits.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for AVFCCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply only online through the official portal at https://JOBS.AVFCCL.NET.IN/. No other mode of application is accepted.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for AVFCCL Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification does not specify any application fee. Candidates should verify this on the official application portal.

faq.question: Q9. What is the minimum work experience required for the CFO post?
faq.answer: A minimum of 25 years of post-qualification work experience is required, including at least 2 years at a senior management level in Finance.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the AVFCCL CFO job location?
faq.answer: The job location is the AVFCCL Guwahati Corporate Office, Assam, though the company reserves the right to post selected candidates at any of its locations/sites as per requirement.
